original_title: HGOT-053 The quiet temptation of a beautiful wife who lives across the street. We who lost reason are deeply intertwined. Risa Mochizuki
overview: A married woman with a charming beauty who lives across the street. A beautiful wife who sends a temptation to me who has witnessed the couple's activities. A beautiful wife begins to seek a body regardless of my sense of immorality, and it gradually becomes bold. It will develop into a relationship where you can not leave the climax repeatedly, immersing yourself in the desire-filled temptation of a beautiful wife, loving each other.
